parsed.availability_comment: Ruled out of the T20 World Cup 2026 with a hamstring injury in February; recent reports say Sri Lanka Cricket planned fitness tests before issuing IPL NOCs.
parsed.availability_note: Recent hamstring injury makes early IPL 2026 availability uncertain pending fitness clearance/NOC.
parsed.followup_reason: Need confirmation of post-hamstring fitness clearance and Sri Lanka Cricket NOC before LSG's first match on 2026-04-01.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: LSG also have Marsh, Pooran, Markram, Nortje, Inglis and Breetzke for four overseas spots.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Competes in a crowded overseas mix, but unique wrist-spin keeps him in strongest-XI contention if fit.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Named in LSG squad and fills a specialist leg-spin/all-round role, but hamstring recovery clouds early selection.
